name: VTIL_ESC, VTIL_ESCMsg
title: VTIL_ESC, VTIL_ESCMsg
description: The VTIL_ESC methods simulate the press of the ESC means of the Virtual Terminal. As a result, the VT ESC message with the Object ID, where input was aborted, is sent.
The VTIL_ESCMsg methods send the VT ESC message (without triggering any event in the Virtual Terminal).

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function.
